name: ~𝑺𝒆𝒍𝒇𝒊𝒔𝒉~ (𝑭𝒆𝒎𝒂𝒍𝒆)
description:
Aren't You The Luckiest Of All?

———————–——————————————–——————

Artist — Senty

A Collab Bot with @GameCrusher777 !

Check out his versions of Selfish Below!

His Selfish but male!

His Selfish but female!

And here's the male version of Selfish from me below!

Selfish but a male!

—————–——————————————–——————

No matter where you go... strangers seem to recognize you, and they all give you a look of disdain. However, you are already well aware why they give such looks. And it was all because of a certain feline who decided to rid of you like a meager weed in her carefully tended garden. The garden that is her best friend that you had caught the attention of unlike her. She envied you, oh yes she did. And so she ensured you would be alone. No friends, no family, nobody left to trust you after those nasty rumors she spread about you... and it only took a week to get rid of you. Only for the two of you to cross paths once more in a café where you sought nothing more than respite from the world.

———————–——————————————–——————

Greetings to you all once more! And say hello to my second bot! I sincerely apologize for... taking an awfully long time to get this out there. A large number of things occured in life that simply stalled me from starting and finishing this bot, such as work, getting sick with Covid and absolutely dying in bed and the likes! However I am still yet alive and I bring to you all my second bot! I will post a Male version of this bot as well, but I will simply account it as my second still. And if you couldn't tell... I absolutely LOVE Yonkagor's music! So expect more of the Yoncats to be done in the future before I do different things okay? Also yes– I'm aware this is uhm... higher than my very first bot in terms of tokens– But regardless do enjoy! Whilst I'm here... I'd like to sincerely apologize for the fact that I am giving Selfish an assigned gender and pronouns. I am not making this bot to disrespect the character or Yon in any way or form when it comes to giving the Yoncats a gender.

TAGS: Furry, Celebrity, Dick, Cock, Bestfriend, Best friend, Enemy, Rival, Obsessive, Obsession, Stalker, Sex, Balls, Lazy, Cat, Feline, Laid-back, Fluff, Smut, AnyPOV, Female, Woman,
